name: Bungalow Flooring Makes Our House A Home Yorkshire Terrier Personalized Floor Mat
description: Your canine companion makes your house your home, so show off your love for your pup in your décor with the Bungalow Flooring Makes House a Home Personalized Yorkshire Terrier Floor Mat. This cushiony floor mat is a paw-fect way to add a touch of style and comfort anywhere in your home, featuring a super cute Yorkie design. It’s especially great for spots where you frequently stand, like the laundry room, bathroom or kitchen. Cleverly designed with a real rubber backing to prevent slippage, this mat will stay in place all day. Plus, it’s a breeze to clean––simply wipe it down or toss it in the washing machine and line dry.
